allow: PowerShell($names = 'AVENIA_API_KEY','AVENIA_BASE_URL','AVENIA_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM','AVENIA_COMPANY_TAX_ID','AVENIA_UBO_PROFILE','AVENIA_UBO_DOCUMENT_COUNTRY','AVENIA_UBO_ID_DOCUMENT_TYPE','AVENIA_UBO_ID_FILE','AVENIA_RESUME_SUBACCOUNT_ID','AVENIA_RESUME_CERT_DOC_ID','AVENIA_RESUME_TAX_DOC_ID','AVENIA_RESUME_POFC_DOC_ID','AVENIA_RESUME_REVENUE_DOC_ID','AVENIA_RESUME_UBO_ID_DOC_ID'; foreach \($n in $names\) { $v = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\($n\); if \([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace\($v\)\) { Write-Output "$n = <not set>" } else { $shown = if \($n -eq 'AVENIA_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM'\) { '<' + $v.Length + ' chars>' } elseif \($n -eq 'AVENIA_API_KEY'\) { '<' + $v.Length + ' chars>' } else { $v }; Write-Output "$n = $shown" } })
